content: Sorli the Builder: That foreign cunt Idgrod Ravencrone thinks she can rule Hjaalmarch better than a true Nord like me. Once the Stormcloaks kick those Imperial milk-drinkers out, I'll have her head mounted over my throne. Serana: Oh darling, why stop at just her head? In my family, we liked to collect the... trophies. Blood and power make far better decorations than dusty old banners. Sorli the Builder: Hah! You’ve got spirit, vampire. But tell me—does your lover MJR prefer a woman who rules or one who kneels? Serana: Lucky for me, he enjoys both. One moment I'm bending him over a ruin's altar, the next he's pinning me down while Lydia watches, soaked and seething. Politics is just foreplay, Sorli. You should try it sometime.

Sorli the Builder: Well, vampire, you’ve given me some… inspirin’ ideas. Maybe I’ll decorate Highmoon Hall with more than just Idgrod’s head—skin her bitch daughter too, turn ‘er into a nice rug for MJR to fuck Lydia on. Serana: Oh, now you’re thinking like a Volkihar. Just save me the fingers—I collect them. Perfect for teasing MJR’s cock when Lydia’s not looking.
Lydia: Ugh, this place stinks of mead and peasant sweat.
